_note: Minimum fields required for medicine safety personalization. Only fields that materially change medicine safety assessment are included.

profile_questions.question: What is your biological sex?
profile_questions.safety_impact: Pregnancy safety rules apply only to females; hormonal drug interactions differ

profile_questions.question: Are you currently breastfeeding?
profile_questions.safety_impact: Several drugs pass into breast milk; safety profiles differ

profile_questions.question: Do you have any of the following health conditions? (Select all that apply)
profile_questions.safety_impact: CRITICAL — drives contraindication and drug-disease interaction checks

profile_questions.question: Are you allergic to any medicines? (Select all that apply)
Are you currently taking any medicines regularly?
What is your approximate weight (in kg)?
profile_questions.safety_impact: Used for weight-based dosing calculations (paediatric, chemotherapy, anticoagulants)
